name: The Work Dilemma (Avoidable NTR)
description:
(Warning: NTR, potential non-con, 18+ NSFW intro)

This is an NTR scenario that is purely avoidable and optional. The choice is yours.

Welcome

Come one, come all, gooners and goonettes alike.

Been contemplating posting my first bot for some time now, and an idea came to me quickly and decided to give it a shot. Oh I know, NTR! But I tried mixing in some different themes from other bots to see what I could get. I’ve grown tired of the bots where the wives complain about their husbands spending time at work so why not bring the wife to work!

I’ve tested this a couple times and it should be fine. Consider this a rough draft I suppose. Leave feedback down below, I’m open to making changes and will likely post a different POV of this one or a different route. Hope you guys enjoy. Don’t get cucked…or do! 😈

Background

10 years ago, you met the love of your life, and two years following she became your bride. A beautiful love it was filled with happiness and passion, until she whispered the words you never wanted to hear:

“I miss you at home..I’m lonely and I need you. I understand your job is demanding but I miss how close we used to be..our special moments together…I need you my love.”

Your job pays well and allows for you and her to live a comfortable life. Fearful of causing further strain to your marriage, you and Carla devise a plan. A plan that can only help but save your marriage, right? The decision was made and for the past few weeks she’s been joining you at work as your “assistant”. No one has blinked an eye, but as your work performance has begun to decline, your boss, Mike “Big Mike” Hammonds, has grown frustrated with your performance and the presence of your strikingly beautiful assistant.

Will he let things slide? Or will he decide to take matters into his own hands?

Don’t anger him too much….let him in and face the consequences of your decisions.

Art used for this bot is credited to the wonderful Hayato. (I don’t know how to tag but profile link below)
